old_value: {"id":"TERP-306","title":"Repair targeted-e2e trust and pre-commit lint parity","description":"Lean tooling-trust repair lane. Scope: 1) make pre-merge and nightly Playwright exit codes truthful, 2) remove CI lint masking, 3) align lint-staged/pre-commit with the official lint contract, 4) rebaseline only the stale targeted critical-path specs and keep resolver/domain-map consumers in sync, 5) update the small set of docs that currently misstate the contract. Non-goals: new QA frameworks, resolver protocol redesign, branch-protection work, or broad critical-path rewrite.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"evan@evanmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T22:12:51Z","created_by":"Evan Tenenbaum","updated_at":"2026-03-27T22:12:51Z"}

{"id":"TERP-92r","title":"Apply inline add, qty, and pricing controls to PO and SO browsers","description":"Carry the sales catalogue inline row control pattern into purchase orders and sales orders. Sales orders need left-edge add plus qty and pre-add price/markup control. Purchase orders need left-edge add plus qty before insertion into the document.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"evan@evanmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-01T07:24:28Z","created_by":"Evan Tenenbaum","updated_at":"2026-04-01T07:24:28Z"}

{"id":"TERP-cg8","title":"Fix SO clientId route hydration on sheet-native create order","description":"Staging repro on build build-mnfyji6b after PR #549 merge. Navigate to /sales?tab=create-order\u0026clientId=1 while authenticated as QA Super Admin. The inventory grid loads and inline qty/price/markup controls render, but the client combobox still shows the placeholder 'Customer...' instead of the hydrated client label. Live QA on 2026-04-01 also confirmed SO inline add works and PO inline qty add works, so this issue is specifically the SO route hydration state, not the broader inline-control feature. Evidence: /tmp/terp-pr549-staging-qa/.playwright-cli/page-2026-04-01T11-36-05-556Z.yml and /tmp/terp-pr549-staging-qa/.playwright-cli/page-2026-04-01T11-38-51-115Z.png","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"evan@evanmail.com","created_at":"2026-04-01T11:43:04Z","created_by":"Evan Tenenbaum","updated_at":"2026-04-01T11:43:04Z"}
